attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ORG_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCTL.REASON_CODE,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE,
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE,
SORCTL.UOM_CODE,
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
/* REPLACED WITH  INNER QUERY : INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL */
INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL
ON SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=EORCTLOL.SS_CODE	/* removing NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BV'*/)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
		ON ( SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
		AND SSOLN.SS_CODE =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
		ON ( SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL
AND  NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG='N')
WHERE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> -9999 AND 
EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> 0
AND SORCTL.LINE_TYPE <> 'FREIGHT' 
AND 
(
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTLN
			WHERE SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID= SMARTLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
			AND SMARTLN.SS_CODE='OOD' )

OR

NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
		WHERE SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
		AND SSOLN.SS_CODE =EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* removing AND SSOLN.SS_CODE ='BV'*/ )
)

SELECT 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ORG_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCTL.REASON_CODE,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE,
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE,
SORCTL.UOM_CODE,
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
/* REPLACED WITH INNER QUERY :   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL */
INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL 
ON SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
              ON (SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
             AND  SSOLN.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* REMOVING SSOLN.SS_CODE = 'BV' */ )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
             ON (SSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
             ON ( SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
                AND  NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG='Y')

SELECT 
	SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	SMARTLN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
	STRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
	SMARTLN.SS_CODE, 
	STRCTLN.ACTION_CODE,
	'I' DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES STRCTLN
/* REPLACED WITH INNER QUERY  : 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL */ 
INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL	
ON STRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
ON ( SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID 
AND  SSOLN.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* REMOVING SSOLN.SS_CODE = 'BV' */
)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (SSOLN.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTLN
ON (STRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMARTLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND SMARTLN.SS_CODE='OOD')
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON ( SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
WHERE NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG='N'
AND  EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL  
AND EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> 0 AND STRCTLN.LINE_TYPE <> 'FREIGHT'
AND EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> -9999
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	SMARTLN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
	EORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
      SMARTLN.SS_CODE, 
	EORCTLN.ACTION_CODE,
	'I' DML_TYPE
	FROM 
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN_OOD EORCTLN
/* REPLACED WITH INNER QUERY :  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL */
	INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL 
ON EORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
		ON ( SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID 
		AND  SSOLN.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* REMOVING SSOLN.SS_CODE = 'BV' */ )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOLN.SS_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTLN
		ON (EORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMARTLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
		AND SMARTLN.SS_CODE='OOD')
	WHERE  
	EORCTLN.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'


UNION ALL

/*OOD FUSN Code*/
SELECT 
	SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	SMARTLN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
	STFRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
	SMARTLN.SS_CODE, 
	STFRCTLN.ACTION_CODE,
	'I' DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES STFRCTLN

INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL	
ON STFRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
ON ( SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID 
AND  SSOLN.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* REMOVING SSOLN.SS_CODE = 'BV' */
)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (SSOLN.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTLN
ON (STFRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMARTLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND SMARTLN.SS_CODE='OOD')
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON ( SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
WHERE NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG='N'
AND  EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL  
AND EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> 0 AND STFRCTLN.LINE_TYPE <> 'FREIGHT'
AND EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> -9999
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	SMARTLN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
	EOFRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
      SMARTLN.SS_CODE, 
	EOFRCTLN.ACTION_CODE,
	'I' DML_TYPE
	FROM 
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN_OOD_FUSN EOFRCTLN

	INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL 
ON EOFRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
		ON ( SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID 
		AND  SSOLN.SS_CODE = EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* REMOVING SSOLN.SS_CODE = 'BV' */ )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOLN.SS_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTLN
		ON (EOFRCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMARTLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
		AND SMARTLN.SS_CODE='OOD')
	WHERE  
	EOFRCTLN.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION
,SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE15
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION
,SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID
,SOFRCTL.LINE_NUMBER
,SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE
,SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.ORG_ID
,SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED
,SOFRCTL.REASON_CODE
,SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE
,SOFRCTL.TAX_RATE
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
,SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE1
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE2
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6
,SOFRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,SOFRCTL.CREATION_DATE
,SOFRCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOFRCTL.SPLIT_KEY
,SOFRCTL.CREATE_DATETIME
,SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE
,'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL
INNER JOIN ( SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID , SS_CODE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLO 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
ON  CAST(CAST(EORCTLO.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF) EORCTLOL
ON SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		ON (NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=EORCTLOL.SS_CODE	/* removing NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BV'*/)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
		ON ( SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
		AND SSOLN.SS_CODE =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
		ON ( SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL
AND  NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG='N')
WHERE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> -9999 AND 
EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <> 0
AND SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE <> 'FREIGHT' 
AND 
(
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTLN
			WHERE SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID= SMARTLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
			AND SMARTLN.SS_CODE='OOD' )

OR

NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOLN
		WHERE SSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
		AND SSOLN.SS_CODE =EORCTLOL.SS_CODE		/* removing AND SSOLN.SS_CODE ='BV'*/ )
)
